name: rarcane-mcp
description: Rust MCP server for Arcane Docker management — manage containers, images, networks, volumes, and compose projects.
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40110 for local use; set to https://rarcane.yourdomain.com for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: rarcane_api_url
settings.description: Base URL of the upstream Arcane API this server manages Docker through, e.g. https://arcane.example.com. Maps to the RARCANE_API_URL env var.

settings.name: rarcane_api_key
settings.description: API key or bearer token for authenticating to the upstream Arcane API. Maps to the RARCANE_API_KEY env var.
